stemHtml: Many pilots will prefer to fly sessions in the simulator during the day rather than at night time, due to the circadian body rhythm. What is correct about the effect of the body temperature's circadian rhythm?

options.a: The changes in body temperature do not affect performance. Rather it is a lack of sunlight that triggers a sleep response and lowers performance.
options.b: The changes in body temperature allow for improved rest during scheduled short sleep periods during the day.
options.c: Falling asleep is easier when the body temperature is rising, as compared to when it is falling.
options.d: When the body temperature is falling it is harder to work, than when it is rising.
